case_title: ADAM SPARKS VS. STEPHANIE CHAMPION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, STEPHANIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAMPION, STEPHANIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 TAYLOR ST. #403, S.F., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER PATRICIA EVEZICH. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-10-2002 AT 9:35 AM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN MUNTER. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PUT THE TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAMPION, TIFFANI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 TAYLOR ST. #403 $5,525.80 RENT, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,666.80, STAYED UNTIL JUN-17-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 6-17-02 @3PM. MONEY JUDGMENT WAIVED IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES BY THAT TIME AND DEFT WAIVES ALL DEPOSITS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, TIFFANI
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPARKS, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, STEPHANIE DOES 1 TO 10
LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON 2/11/02. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTED BY ERIC THRONE. CSR 7855 (GPS)

MONEY JUDGT WAIVED IF DEFT VACATES BY THE TIME AND WAIVES DEPOSITS. JUDGE, JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER, RHONDA AQUILINA;CLERK, T. MARUYAMA. (DEPT. 505)
